title: カーネーションは鮮やかに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though today is usually my day off, I have been summoned by the
empress. I make my way over to our meeting spot.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You've got quite the nerve to keep me waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list:
I'm sorry... Oh, did we always have a vegetable
field?

I'm sorry... Oh, did we always have a vegetable
field?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You didn't know about it? It's official academy property, and we even
utilize it for some classes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I called you out here to help me move these.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her gaze, I see a number of wooden carts filled with
flowers. Red, white, yellow... it certainly makes for a colorful sight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We have more blooms than anticipated. This was not originally my
intention, but I could use a hand.
choice_data_list:
Well, you're in luck! I've got two, complete with
green thumbs!

Well, you're in luck! I've got two, complete with
green thumbs!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If you've got time for jokes then you've got time for work. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they're all so lovely! Thank you for doing this every year, Air
Groove!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We park the carts in front of the dormitories, where we're met with a
long line of students.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One flower per person. Stay in line, and tell us which color you desire
when it's your turn.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to deliver them in person if you can, preferably with a
letter or gift. That's the best way to show your appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Mom's definitely going to love this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I suddenly remember what day it is.
choice_data_list: So these are Mother's Day carnations?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I always plant them so that they'll bloom around this
time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Many of us are living far away from our parents currently. At times like
these, it's more important than ever to show our gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Incidentally, do you know what a yellow carnation signifies?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Do I have to explain everything?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
First, take the red carnation. It signifies love for one's mother. It
makes for a very popular gift on this day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, a yellow carnation signifies jealousy, and is often
avoided as a gift.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You may be surprised to hear that there are a number of students who
choose the yellow carnations.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Many of them are second-generation runners, and it is no stretch to
say that they see their own mothers as their biggest rivals.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In other words, giving your mother a yellow carnation is akin to saying
that you will surpass her legacy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: All right, that was the last student. Thank you for your help.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It looks like we only have a single yellow carnation remaining.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove smiles gently as her eyes fall onto the remaining blossom.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I suppose I'll give this one to my own mother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Air Groove is about to take the flower into her own hands, we
hear a pair of footsteps hesitantly approaching.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: U-umm...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're from Ritto Dorm. Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
I was doing some extra training today, and before I knew it the sun
started setting. Um... Are the flowers all gone?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No—in fact, you're quite lucky. There's exactly one left.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Go on, it's yours.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The young girl bows her head in thanks to Air Groove and promptly
departs.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... Just enough, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her visage is stoic with a hint of satisfaction... but it's difficult to tell
what she is really feeling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do know that she was planning on taking that last flower, though. I
can't help but be reminded of when she was injured at the dance
lesson.
choice_data_list: Are you neglecting yourself for others again?
Are you neglecting yourself for others again?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. You're such a worrywart.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm not too proud about what happened at that dance lesson, but I've
thought long and hard about my attitude since then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If I mean to earn the respect of others, I need to respect myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's no good pursuing my ideals if I neglect my own needs in the
process. On that point, I admit... I was a little foolish.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What just happened now is different, though.
choice_data_list: You're not sacrificing your own well-being?
You're not sacrificing your own well-being?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's right. I don't mind going without a flower at all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even without a tangible symbol to represent it, the resolve in my
heart is firm. I will tell my mother of my ambition directly.
choice_data_list: That does seem more your style.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Exactly. So there is nothing you need to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I can't have any trainer of mine being too flustered for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Although... I suppose if you hadn't spoken up in the infirmary, I...
wouldn't have...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm taking better care of myself now, that's all!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My mother doesn't often reminisce about her racing career, but I once
overheard her say that she couldn't have become a queen by
herself...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That the watchful eyes of someone she trusted became a mirror—one
which more honestly reflected her ideal self.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What I'm trying to say is... well, you know.
choice_data_list: You have my eyes whenever you need them.
You have my eyes whenever you need them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Why do I get the sense that you're teasing me? ...Fool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a hint of kindness in her halfhearted scolding. We pause
awhile to watch the sun set.
